Dax & Elvis go barbershop on ASU's record board: packed with international Olympians like Leon Marchand (France), Hubert Kos (Hungary), & Ilya Kharun (Canada) - exactly 0 Americans.
Is it fair?

title: Kate Douglass 49.93 — No Lazy Turns
Caeleb Dressel Needs His Swagger Back
Kate Douglass Rings Cowbell Cate Campbell's WR - First Woman Under 50 in 100 SCM Free!
description:
Dax & Elvis break down Kate Douglas's INSANE 49.93 SCM 100 free at World Cup Singapore (Oct 25, 2025) - first woman EVER under 50, smashing her own WR (50.19 from Toronto) and destroying Cate Campbell's world record.
“Women going boys' times—I'm out of the 100 game!” – Elvis

We roast Cate Campbell's "infernal cowbell" complaint, praise Kate's killer turns & technique (“no lazy turns!”), and celebrate the USA smackdown: “Putting hands on 'em—take their will!”

title: Dressel to JAX with Jungbluth: He Needs to Get His Swagger Back
description: Dax and Elvis dive deep into Dressel's announcement to head back under Coach Steve Jungbluth at JAX. They break it down hard: he's lost that killer swagger, stuck in limbo with commuting between Gainesville and Jacksonville, half-assing elite training/recovery, and prioritizing "nice guy" vibes over GOAT mentality. title: The Enhanced Games: Dirty Work or Game Changer?
Enhanced Games: Million-Dollar Cheaters or Swimming’s Savior?
description:
Dax and Elvis dive deep into the controversial Enhanced Games – the TRT-fueled meet paying swimmers millions while World Aquatics watches from the cheap seats. Is it a greedy publicity stunt to sell TRT or a much-needed wake-up call for pro swimming pay? From $200K salaries to questioning who was really juiced back in the tech-suit era, the boys hold nothing back. Clock it. 🕐💉
